message:
Add no-op compaction guard and thread ResolvedCompactionSettings through all AgentSession call sites

- compaction.rs: Return None from prepare_compaction() when both
  messages_to_summarize and turn_prefix_messages are empty, avoiding a
  pointless LLM call early in sessions (e.g. session header entries only)
- pi_debug.rs: Construct ResolvedCompactionSettings from Config and pass
  to AgentSession::new(), matching the pattern in main.rs
- rpc.rs, extension_tools.rs, agent_loop_vcr.rs, rpc_mode.rs,
  rpc_protocol.rs: Update all test call sites from 3-arg to 4-arg
  AgentSession::new() with ResolvedCompactionSettings::default()

This completes the ResolvedCompactionSettings threading started in the
previous commit — every constructor call site now carries the settings,
and early-session compaction no longer issues empty summarization requests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
